data.title: Avathon launches AI platform for liquid bulk logistics operations, proven with one of world's largest fleets.
data.description: Avathon has unveiled Autonomy for Logistics Planning on September 25, 2025, in Pleasanton, California. The company, known for having one of the largest oil and gas vessel fleets globally, is extending this technology to enhance all liquid bulk logistics operations. The new system incorporates proven AI technology to streamline planning and execution processes.

data.title: Tencent Cloud partners with StarkCloud to drive digital transformation in Latin America through strategic partnership.
data.description: Hong Kong, September 24, 2025 - Today, Tencent Cloud, part of the renowned global tech company Tencent, revealed a significant collaboration with StarkCloud, a prominent cloud services provider in Brazil. This partnership aims to drive digital transformation in Latin America. Through this alliance, both companies will work together to enhance the region's technological advancements.

data.title: 2025 World Manufacturing Convention in Hefei, China saw strong attendance with participants from various industries.
data.description: In Hefei, China on September 20, 2025, the 2025 World Manufacturing Convention commenced, attracting a diverse international crowd to Anhui province. Attendees from across the globe, spanning various industries and professions, gathered to...

data.title: XAG drones assist Brazilian farmers in overcoming weather challenges during planting season, improving efficiency and reducing labor needs.
data.description: In Belo Horizonte, Brazil, on September 24, 2025, farmers are encountering challenges at the start of the planting season. The unpredictable weather patterns coupled with a shortage of labor are posing difficulties. Factors such as irregular rainfall, sudden heatwaves, and intense storms are complicating the timing of seeding and crop protection efforts. As a result, farmers across Brazil are experiencing setbacks and uncertainties.

data.title: Cohu Inc. increases and sets price for $260M offering of 1.50% Convertible Senior Notes due 2031.
data.description: Cohu, Inc., a leading provider of equipment and services for semiconductor manufacturing efficiency, has revealed the pricing of $260.0 million in aggregate principal amount of 1.50% convertible senior notes due 2031. The Notes were offered in a private placement to qualified institutional buyers under Rule 144A of the Securities Act of 1933. This move aims to raise funds for the company's future endeavors and growth strategies.

data.title: BTC +0.82% to $113,254.92, ETH -1.42% to $4,124.28, XRP +2.82% to $2.91. Market cautious, BTC sees rebound.
data.description: Leading cryptocurrencies experienced slight gains on Wednesday, with Bitcoin up 0.82% at $113,254.92, Ethereum down 1.42% at $4,124.28, XRP up 2.82% at $2.91, Solana down 1.65% at $210.87, and Dogecoin up 0.29% at $0.2398. Bitcoin almost hit $114,000 after a recent sell-off, while Ethereum dropped to $4,081.35, 16.82% below its record high. Bitcoin's market dominance rose to 58%, with altcoins excluding Ethereum making up over 29%. $270 million was liquidated from the market in 24 hours, with $186 million in long liquidations. Bitcoin's open interest fell 1.35%. A decrease in open interest alongside a price rise typically indicates short sellers closing their positions. More than 55% of Binance traders with open BTC positions.

data.title: Rubicon Organics presents at Small Cap Discoveries in Vancouver and Planet MicroCap Showcase in Toronto in 2025. TSXV: ROMJ, OTCQX: ROMJF.
data.description: Rubicon Organics Inc., a top premium licensed producer in Canada specializing in organic certified cannabis products, will be taking part in two upcoming investor-focused events. The company will be attending Small Cap Discoveries in Vancouver on September 29–30 and the Planet MicroCap Showcase in Toronto on October 21–23. Rubicon Organics trades as TSXV: ROMJ and OTCQX: ROMJF.

data.title: Dow Jones futures up; indexes steady but Astera Labs and hot stocks stumble. Indices fall; Astera Labs and Credo Technology stand out.
data.description: On Wednesday, stock indexes experienced slight declines, with notable companies like Astera Labs and Credo Technology standing out as winners during the fall season. Despite this, Dow Jones Futures showed a rise, and although the indexes held steady, many popular stocks, including Astera Labs, saw a decrease in value. The overall performance of the market on Wednesday was mixed, with some stocks showing resilience while others faced significant drops.
